label: Active LP Dashboard
description: Concentrated liquidity position tracker with TVL, fees earned, impermanent loss, and in-range status.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports — data via useStrategiesData().

0.8.note: context does not expose error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions; context falls back to mock data silently on API error.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass (0.8 partial — context error surface deferred to context redesign).

1.1.note: lpPositions sourced exclusively from useStrategiesData() hook.

1.2.note: context calls useGlobalScope() and filters strategies by org/client/strategy cascade.

1.3.note: org filter changes strategy data set.

1.6.note: empty scope arrays return unfiltered dataset (DEFAULT_STRATEGIES).

1.7.note: LP position mock data lives in strategies-data-context.tsx (not in lib/mocks/).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time LP position tracking), paper ✓ (simulated positions), batch ✗ (N/A — point-in-time LP data has no batch mode meaning).

3.2.note: context reads useExecutionMode() and exposes isLive+mode; widget reads isLoading from context which is mode-aware.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget should show simulated LP positions; no submission buttons present so no disabling needed.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval polling in widget; data is context-driven (REST via useStrategyPerformance).

3.3.note: Human verify: batch mode — no order buttons present, widget is read-only.

3.4.note: Human verify: batch/as-of indicator visible when in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1, 3.2, 3.5, 3.6 complete. Human must verify 3.3 and 3.4 in browser.

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers — widget is read-only table, no action buttons.

4.2.note: No href links in this widget.

4.5.note: No route links in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path; handled at registry level.

4.3.note: Human verify: columns display all needed LP data fields.

4.4.note: Human verify: sorting works per column.

4.8.note: Human verify: table scrolls within widget bounds.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1, 4.2, 4.5, 4.6 pass. Human must verify 4.3, 4.4, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: AMM LP provision (concentrated liquidity), Uniswap V3-style range positions. Widget serves defi/amm-lp family.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented. Human must walk through 5.2-5.6 (LP position config, edge cases, cross-widget flow).

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 8 tests covering render, KPI aggregation (TVL/fees/positions count), loading state, empty state, out-of-range badge. See tests/widgets/strategies/active-lp-dashboard.test.tsx

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file; data from context.

7.3.note: 129 lines — within 500 limit. No function > 200 lines.

7.4.note: PascalCase components, useCamelCase hooks, kebab-case file. Compliant.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function. CLEAN.

7.7.note: useMemo deps are primitive values (lpPositions array). No inline objects in deps.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on Badge className (lines 48, 110). --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) is defined in globals.css @theme inline block.
8.1.fix: Replaced text-[10px] → text-micro at 2 sites (in-range Badge, out-of-range Badge).

8.3.note: Uses TableWidget (shared), KpiStrip (shared), Badge (ui). Shared primitives used.

8.4.note: No img/input/interactive-div elements. TableWidget handles table a11y. No bare interactive divs.

8.5.note: Human verify: renders at minW=4, minH=4. No horizontal scroll at 1280/1920.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (text-micro token applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 human-verify pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Distinct LP-specific data (range status, IL%, fees) that differs from liquidation-monitor and lending-arb-dashboard. Each serves a different DeFi strategy type.

relationships.notes: Standalone read-only table. No cross-widget selection coupling. Shares StrategiesDataProvider with other strategies widgets.

dataContract.notes: LP position data currently static mock in context. Production: should poll DeFi protocol APIs (Uniswap V3, Aave) via strategies service.

gaps: IL calculation not verified against on-chain data
coverage.notes: Widget covers concentrated liquidity LP monitoring. Not yet verified end-to-end with real protocol data.

findings.description: active-lp-dashboard-widget.tsx — ~9 user-visible strings (column headers, badge labels, empty message)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: active-lp-dashboard-widget.tsx:48,110 — text-[10px] arbitrary font-size on Badge className; no text-2xs token in globals.css
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro=0.625rem/10px) at both Badge sites.

findings.description: context does not expose API error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions; context falls back to mock data silently
findings.deferReason: requires context redesign — acceptable for current mock-data phase
